dialogues.text: You made bar graphs with scale of 10. You read values at the lines AND between the lines. Let's see what you know.
Look at the Fiction bar. What value does the Fiction bar show?
40. The bar ends right at the 40 line on the axis.
Look at Team A's bar. It ends between the lines. The bar is between 30 and 40. What value does this show?
35. It's halfway between 30 and 40. Half of 10 is 5.
Create the bar graph. Some values are at the lines, some are between.
Markers and Paintbrushes at the lines. Crayons and Glue Sticks between the lines. You placed all four correctly.
Use the graph you made. How many MORE art supplies does Glue Sticks have than Markers?
25 more. Glue Sticks has 55, Markers has 30. The difference is 25.
You can read bar graphs with scale of 10, even values between the lines. You're ready to practice.
